data.title: Align red-test-evaluator with shared standard: add refactoring survival and suite-level value criteria
data.description:
## Description

Restructure the red-test-evaluator agent prompt to reference the shared behavioral testing standard and add two evaluator-specific rejection criteria.

### Steps
1. In `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md` Section 3 (verdict decision logic):
   - Add a reference to the shared behavioral testing standard: "Consult plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md for the 4-rule behavioral testing standard. Apply these rules as baseline rejection criteria."
   - Note: standard file created by sibling story 4095-e3d9. Reference as consumption point even if not yet present.
2. Add refactoring survival criterion:
   - "Refactoring survival: Reject if the submitted test would break under semantics-preserving refactoring (variable renaming, method extraction, internal restructuring). A test that breaks on implementation changes while behavior is preserved is a change-detector test."
3. Add suite-level value criterion:
   - "Suite-level value: Reject if the submitted test is redundant with existing suite coverage — the same observable behavior is already asserted by another test in the suite. Duplicate assertions add maintenance burden without improving fault detection."
4. Ensure existing verdict logic (REVISE/REJECT/CONFIRM) remains functional with the new criteria integrated.
5. Remove .test-index RED marker from the RED test task.

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md` — Edit (Section 3 restructure + new criteria)
- `.test-index` — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Evaluator references shared behavioral testing standard
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard" plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- [ ] Refactoring survival criterion present
  Verify: grep -qi "refactoring survival" plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- [ ] Suite-level value criterion present
  Verify: grep -qi "suite.level value" plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q "\[evaluator_alignment" .test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
